g.text: The subject is located in the Low Density Residential District (R2) zoning area which is a Low Density Residential
The current use for the subject property is walkup and is a permitted use based on the current zoning guidelines.
No zoning change is believed to be imminent. Based on the foregoing, it appears that the subject’s improvements
are a legally conforming use of the subject site.
1101, 1121 109 St, North Battleford, Saskatchewan | File VAL251012 - 1
